ideation: This animation sequence depicts the robot using a hammer and wrench.  The sequence will show the robot holding the tools, then using them in a simple, repetitive motion. The robot does not actually have hands, so the tools will be positioned near the end of the robot's arms, to simulate the use of the tools. Frame 1 shows the robot holding the tools. Frame 2 shows the robot lifting the hammer. Frame 3 shows the robot bringing the hammer down. Frame 4 shows the robot lifting the wrench. Frame 5 shows the robot turning the wrench.

frames.beat: arms hold tools loosely at sides
left arm lifts hammer into position
hammer strikes down with a thud
right arm brings wrench up to bolt
wrench turns the bolt with a click
